title: Formula Syntax Validation on Save
excerpt: When creating formulas in Monday.com there is very limited error checking on the formula syntax. This can lead to incorrect or failed calculations. Formula fields should have a robust syntax checking engine (similar to h…

posts.author: AndrewPike.Fogo (Andrew Pike)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating formulas in Monday.com there is very limited error checking on the formula syntax. This can lead to incorrect or failed calculations. Formula fields should have a robust syntax checking engine (similar to how Salesforce validates field formulas)
